category_sources: source_facts.description says open-source distributed event streaming platform; official Apache Kafka GitHub README uses the same distributed event streaming description.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://kafka.apache.org/ and official repository use Apache Kafka as the project name; source_facts.name is kafka.
docs_sources: Official Apache Kafka site provides dedicated documentation and quickstart pages; Apache Kafka code page identifies kafka.apache.org documentation as official project documentation.
repo_sources: Official Apache Kafka code page says the code is kept in the Apache GitHub repo and shows cloning https://github.com/apache/kafka.git; source_facts.repo was empty so repo was determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies distributed event streaming; source_facts.executables lists many kafka-* CLI tools; official GitHub README says Kafka uses Java and Scala.
